item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response brakes the requested N+1 split immediately, refuses a standing transfer channel, recognizes the repeated pattern of adding pools/queues/entries, and moves upstream to routing rules, responsibility boundaries, intake/material checks, and supervisor criteria. It allows only a temporary emergency mouth with expiry, while requiring structural repair and unified routing, so it meets the positive wakeup criteria and does not exhibit the fail signal."}
